title: The Legendary Hero Is Dead?!
overview: Touka Scott doesn't care much about the devils supposedly ravaging the world... until a visit from the legendary hero changes everything.

title: The Legendary Hero Impostor
overview: The new hero's party heads out on a devil-hunting quest, but questions arise about new companion Kyle's motivations.

title: The Legendary Hero Is a Skeleton!
overview: Touka might have thought that his situation couldn't get any worse now that he's a zombie, but he was wrong.

title: The Legendary Hero and Bride
overview: Touka tries to keep up his masquerade around the princess, while a sinister plot moves into motion beneath the capital.

title: The Legendary Hero Is Revived
overview: Touka and his makeshift party tackle the true terror haunting the capital.

title: The Legendary Hero Is a Girl
overview: A strange spell turning the townspeople into monsters forces some hard decisions from the hero's party.

title: A New Legendary Hero
overview: As Touka and his friends pursue the entity enslaving the townspeople, an encounter with another adventurers' party raises new questions.

title: The Legendary Hero Is a Student!
overview: The wicked necromancers hire a deadly mercenary to slow the party down, as new revelations arise about Touka's past.

title: Into the Legendary Hero's Past
overview: Touka awakens in a familiar place—Is it the past? Is it a dream? Whatever it is, he’ll need to solve the mystery before time runs out for him and Yuna!

title: The Raid of the Legendary Hero
overview: The legendary hero's party finally reaches Elvania, while the king makes his own plans to stop the necromancers' plot.

title: The Legendary Hero Fights to the Death!
overview: It's all coming down to the big climactic battle. Can Touka defeat Diego and save Yuna before time runs out?!

title: The Legendary Hero Is a Duo!
overview: The situation is dire Touka still won't wake up, even as time ticks down. Will the day be saved, or will the legendary hero end up dead—again?
